name: cajueiro-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by Marcelo Cajueiro (cajueiro.tech).

plugins.name: narrate
plugins.description: Turn a document (PDF, Markdown, HTML, text) into a narrated audio file with Gemini TTS. Ships a skill that extracts the text, chunks it, synthesizes each chunk with retry/resume, and loudness-normalizes the result to MP3.

plugins.name: transcribe
plugins.description: Turn an audio or video file (mp3, m4a, wav, mp4, …) into a text transcript with Gemini STT. Ships a skill that splits the recording into chunks, transcribes each with retry/resume, and joins them into one Markdown transcript with optional timestamps and speaker labels.

plugins.name: agentic-cr
plugins.description: Agentic code review pipeline for GitHub PRs. Ships /cr — two independent review passes in parallel (baseline /code-review + specialized pr-review-toolkit), consolidated into one deduplicated PR comment, followed by a finding-by-finding fix pass.

plugins.name: html-password-gate
plugins.description: Password-protect a static HTML page with no backend: encrypt it with AES-256-GCM before upload, decrypt it in the browser. Ships an encrypt/deploy skill for Cloudflare Pages and GitHub Pages.
